'''ngadobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackpot|crackpot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackpot|crackpot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngadobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædebeth|ngædebeth]] || [[word:ngædebej|ngædebej]] || [[word:ngædebesh|ngædebesh]] || [[word:ngædebe|ngædebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadodoboth|ngadodoboth]] || [[word:ngadodoboj|ngadodoboj]] || [[word:ngadodobosh|ngadodobosh]] || [[word:ngadodobo|ngadodobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadoboth|ngadoboth]] || [[word:ngadoboj|ngadoboj]] || [[word:ngadobosh|ngadobosh]] || [[word:ngadobo|ngadobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadofboth|ngadofboth]] || [[word:ngadofboj|ngadofboj]] || [[word:ngadofbosh|ngadofbosh]] || [[word:ngadofbof|ngadofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadobotho|ngadobotho]] || [[word:ngadobojo|ngadobojo]] || [[word:ngadobosho|ngadobosho]] || [[word:ngadoboko|ngadoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadoboth|ngadoboth]] || [[word:ngadoboj|ngadoboj]] || [[word:ngadobosh|ngadobosh]] || [[word:ngadobo|ngadobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadobothol|ngadobothol]] || [[word:ngadobojol|ngadobojol]] || [[word:ngadoboshol|ngadoboshol]] || [[word:ngadobokol|ngadobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadobothotho|ngadobothotho]] || [[word:ngadobojojo|ngadobojojo]] || [[word:ngadoboshosho|ngadoboshosho]] || [[word:ngadoboko|ngadoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadobothon|ngadobothon]] || [[word:ngadobojon|ngadobojon]] || [[word:ngadoboshon|ngadoboshon]] || [[word:ngadobokon|ngadobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadobothoro|ngadobothoro]] || [[word:ngadobojoro|ngadobojoro]] || [[word:ngadoboshoro|ngadoboshoro]] || [[word:ngadobokoro|ngadobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
